basic_details.job_title: BTSC Food Analyst Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Bihar Technical Service Commission (BTSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 11 Food Analyst. Candidates with B.Sc, M.Sc, M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 19-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BTSC website, btsc.bihar.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: For appointment as Food Analyst, the candidate must have passed the Food Analyst examination conducted by Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI), New Delhi.

salary_details.pay_scale: Revised Pay Structure Level-09 (Pre-revised Pay Band-2: Rs. 9300–34,800/-, Grade Pay Rs. 5400/-)

selection_process: Written Examination – Computer Based Test (CBT), 100 Marks, 2 Hours
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the BTSC official website https://www.btsc.bihar.gov.in. Hard copy, printed, handwritten, or offline applications will not be accepted. The online portal will be active from 20-05-2026 to 19-06-2026. Candidates must upload all required certificates and marksheets in the designated columns during the online application. All certificates must be issued on or before 19-06-2026. Candidates must ensure they satisfy all eligibility criteria before applying. Registered Mobile Number and Email ID must not be changed after submission as all communication will be sent through SMS/Email only.
seo_tags: Bihar Technical Service Commission Food Analyst Recruitment 2026
